text: Minimally invasive surgical technologies are advancing at the speed of light, and Southwest Washington Medical Center is keeping pace, utilizing the latest surgical tools and working with world-class physicians.
Our pioneering spirit is helping to redefine healthcare in Southwest Washington.
With high tech robotics and advanced catheter based technologies most of Southwest minimally invasive surgical patients experience less pain and have much faster recovery times.
Southwest is among a select group of hospitals in the United States to treat AAAs with minimally invasive catheters and a newly designed stent graft.
The catheter is run up through the weakened artery and the stent is carefully put in place to shore things up.
